reason: Paint inspector and biome authoring UI live in Terrain.Editor and must follow the editor MVVM/layout conventions.
The biome layer panel is an Avalonia inspector component; this covers layout, bindings, and ViewModel sync patterns.
Biome selection, rule selection, and material slot data cross EditorState, services, and viewmodels.
Use the editor review checklist while reshaping the inspector UI and bindings.
Shared thinking guides apply before making UI and data-flow changes.

Summarizes the existing biome/climate architecture, relevant services, and current UI gaps for this task.
Captures the RuleLayer and modifier-stack interaction model that the new inspector layout is aligning toward.
